title: Everybody Hurts
why_this_song: Everybody Hurts by R.E.M. (1992) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Of this life, well hang on
Don't throw your hand, oh no

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "hold" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "hold" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "everybody" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "everybody" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: If you feel like letting go (hold on)
If you're on your own in this life

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: And the night, the night is yours alone
Don't throw your hand, oh no
Of this life to hang on

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Everybody Hurts" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Everybody Hurts" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Everybody Hurts", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Everybody Hurts", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Everybody Hurts" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Everybody Hurts" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
